title: Minecraft: Console Edition
description: Bringing back the old Console editions, one step at a time!
body:
![Header Image](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Minecraft_Console_Edition/BH_MCE_header.webp)

## Bringing back our childhoods
Minecraft: Console Edition seeks to recreate and emulate the old Console Editions of Minecraft in modern versions!

It utilizes mods like Legacy4J to achieve this properly with User Interfaces, Gamma systems and more, in combination with Nostalgic Tweaks to re-implement old features into new minecraft, which seamlessly creates a Nostalgic experience in 1.20!


![Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Minecraft_Console_Edition/BH_MCE_overview.webp)
## Features
- TU30 tutorial world
- 1.6.4 world gen
- Controller Support
- Gamma (Nearly 100% accurate to LCE!)
- Old features and tweaks added via Nostalgic Tweaks
- Properly configured, out of the box playable and ready to go!

### If you encounter issues, or want to request a feature, see our issue tracker
![Old Villages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VLzAPCXB/images/a0b9ec1a4fe0097a3d8772fc08ee95c4cfea4fa3.png)
